introSection: Maximus is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Crealy Adventure Park & Resort in Exeter, Devon, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: From 2000 to 2009, the ride was known as Pastil Loco. Some signs around the ride (and on the park's website) refer to the ride as Maximus the ride. Most sources either call it Maximus or Maximus rollercoaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through a series of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

sections.content: Brown track and Brown supports. The ride used to have Blue track and yellow supports from 2010-2021. When the ride was known as Pastil Loco, it had red track and green supports.

fullText:
Maximus is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at Crealy Adventure Park & Resort in Exeter, Devon, England, UK.

From 2000 to 2009, the ride was known as Pastil Loco. Some signs around the ride (and on the park's website) refer to the ride as Maximus the ride. Most sources either call it Maximus or Maximus rollercoaster.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through a series of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

Brown track and Brown supports. The ride used to have Blue track and yellow supports from 2010-2021. When the ride was known as Pastil Loco, it had red track and green supports.
